name: TerrarAI
description: AI-powered agentic NPC mod for Terraria — 1st Place at HackPrinceton '25 xAI Track, winning $8K in xAI credits out of 800+ participants
content:
# TerrarAI (1st Place at HackPrinceton - xAI Track)

An AI-powered agent mod for Terraria tModLoader that lets you spawn intelligent NPCs capable of understanding and executing natural language commands.

## Features
- Spawn AI agents that understand natural language instructions
- Command agents to gather resources, build structures, and mine
- AI-powered planning system using xAI (Grok) for complex task breakdown
- ReAct-style reasoning loop with Grok-4-Fast and C# for context-aware decision-making across 50+ parallel agents
- Structured JSON-based action parser and system prompt interface
- Real-time agent status tracking and feedback
- Chat-based command interface
